issues.title: Unsanitized shell execution
issues.description: User-controlled input is interpolated into a shell command and executed directly.
issues.recommendation: Use subprocess with argument arrays or validate and escape the input before execution.

issues.title: SQL query built from string interpolation
issues.code_snippet: query = f"SELECT id, username, email FROM users WHERE username = '{username}'"
issues.description: The query string embeds raw user input and can be manipulated into a SQL injection payload.
issues.recommendation: Use parameterized queries with placeholders instead of string concatenation.

issues.title: Unsafe HTML rendering in profile view
issues.description: The template disables escaping for user-controlled fields and risks stored or reflected XSS.
issues.recommendation: Remove the safe filter and only render trusted, sanitized HTML.

issues.title: Hardcoded application secret
issues.description: A static secret is committed to source control and also reused as a debug fallback.
issues.recommendation: Load secrets from environment variables or a dedicated secret manager.

project_info.main_functionality: Small fixture for showing CodeScan output
